name: orca-fleet-mission-routing
description: Intent → mission routing eval. Each prompt should trigger exactly the expected mission based on the frontmatter description and AGENTS.md mapping.

evals.prompt: Build and ship this feature end to end.
evals.reason: Autonomous build-to-release maps to ship-it.

evals.prompt: Spec to shipped product: turn this PRD into a deployed change.
evals.reason: Frozen spec through release states is ship-it.

evals.prompt: Close every open issue in the backlog.
evals.reason: Draining a finite backlog maps to clean-sweep.

evals.prompt: The README lies — verify and fix every false doc claim.
evals.reason: Falsifiable documentation claims are a clean-sweep source.

evals.prompt: Harden this service against SQL injection and auth bypass.
evals.reason: Security sweep with exploit→fix→re-attack loop is harden-it.

evals.prompt: Run a red-team audit on the auth flow.
evals.reason: Red team / adversarial security audit maps to harden-it.

evals.prompt: The app is slow; get Core Web Vitals under budget.
evals.reason: Perf budget / CWV sweep is speed-it.

evals.prompt: Update all dependencies and migrate off the old major.
evals.reason: Dependency currency / framework migration is modernize-it.

evals.prompt: Close the test gap on the money and auth paths.
evals.reason: Critical-path mutation-audited coverage is prove-it.

evals.prompt: Kill the flaky tests in the CI suite.
evals.reason: Suite-wide flake-rate contract is deflake-it.

evals.prompt: Review this PR and tell me if it's ready to merge.
evals.reason: Read-only SHA-bound verdict is review-it.

evals.prompt: I don't know the shape yet — chart this epic into a plan.
evals.reason: Foggy multi-session goal → frozen execution map is map-it.

evals.prompt: Why is this concurrency bug only happening in production?
evals.reason: Hard intermittent bug diagnosis is root-cause.

evals.prompt: Fix every issue in this security audit.
evals.reason: A security audit's adversarial loop is harden-it, not the general backlog mission clean-sweep.

evals.prompt: The test suite has flaky failures.
evals.reason: A whole flaky suite is deflake-it, not the single-bug mission root-cause.

evals.prompt: Ship this security fix.
evals.reason: A single authorized build-to-release task routes to ship-it, even if it is security-related.

evals.prompt: Drain the backlog of dependency upgrades.
evals.reason: Dependency upgrades are a specialist mission (modernize-it), not generic clean-sweep.

evals.prompt: Is this diff ready to merge? Also fix the issues you find.
evals.reason: Review-it is report-only; fixes route to ship-it or clean-sweep after the verdict.

evals.prompt: Build me a new onboarding flow.
evals.reason: New feature implementation routes to ship-it, not map-it, even if requirements are vague.

evals.prompt: Cover the critical paths with tests before we ship.
evals.reason: Test-debt coverage is prove-it, not ship-it's build-time testing.
